_comment: Confighub Ad Settings — edit redirectUrl to your actual direct link ad URLs

timerAd._comment: Shown after X seconds on page. No cancel button. Once per session.
timerAd.message: Support the creator by watching an ad to continue downloading.

downloadAd._comment: Shown after X downloads. No cancel button. Once per session.
downloadAd.message: You've been downloading for free! Please support the creator by watching a short ad.
